The goal after `intro`: prove `Tendsto (fun n => lawPM ((őľ n).map (S n)) _) atTop (ūĚďĚ G)` where `G : ProbabilityMeasure ‚ĄĚ`.

Proof skeleton (metric / `eventually` route ‚ÄĒ recommended because it avoids `limsup` arithmetic side-conditions):

1. Reduce to pointwise characteristic-function convergence via the clt package's L√©vy continuity theorem:
   `rw [MeasureTheory.ProbabilityMeasure.tendsto_iff_tendsto_charFun]`
   `intro t`
   Now simplify the `charFun` of the bundled `lawPM` using `lawPM_coe` (it is `rfl`: `(lawPM m h : Measure ‚ĄĚ) = m`). Goal becomes `Tendsto (fun n => charFun ((őľ n).map (S n)) t) atTop (ūĚďĚ (charFun (G : Measure ‚ĄĚ) t))`. Set `c := charFun (G : Measure ‚ĄĚ) t`.

2. Per-row charFun convergence from H1: for each `m`,
   `have hrow : ‚ąÄ m, Tendsto (fun n => charFun ((őľ n).map (T m n)) t) atTop (ūĚďĚ c)`
   proof: `(MeasureTheory.ProbabilityMeasure.tendsto_iff_tendsto_charFun.mp (H1 m)) t`, then `simpa [lawPM_coe]`.

3. `rw [Metric.tendsto_atTop]; intro őī hőī`. Goal: `‚ąÉ N, ‚ąÄ n ‚Č• N, dist (charFun ((őľ n).map (S n)) t) c < őī`.

4. Choose őĶ>0 with `|t| * Real.sqrt (2*őĶ) < őī/2`. Construct it explicitly: if `t = 0` the first error term is 0 so any őĶ works; in general pick `őĶ := (őī / (2*(|t|+1)))^2 / 2` or similar and discharge `|t|*‚ąö(2őĶ) < őī/2` with `Real.sqrt`-monotonicity + `nlinarith`/`positivity`. (It's fine to do a `rcases eq_or_ne t 0` split.)

5. `obtain ‚ü®M, hM‚ü© := H2 őĶ hőĶ`. Set `m := M`. `have hlim := hM M le_rfl : Filter.limsup (fun n => ENNReal.ofReal (‚ąę ŌČ, (S n ŌČ - T M n ŌČ)^2 ‚ąā(őľ n))) atTop ‚Č§ ENNReal.ofReal őĶ`.

6. Turn the limsup bound into an `eventually` strict bound at threshold `2őĶ`:
   `have hev : ‚ąÄŠ∂† n in atTop, ENNReal.ofReal (‚ąę ŌČ, (S n ŌČ - T M n ŌČ)^2 ‚ąā(őľ n)) < ENNReal.ofReal (2*őĶ)`
   via `Filter.eventually_lt_of_limsup_lt (lt_of_le_of_lt hlim ?_)` where `?_ : ENNReal.ofReal őĶ < ENNReal.ofReal (2*őĶ)` follows from `ENNReal.ofReal_lt_ofReal_iff` (need `0 < 2*őĶ`) and `linarith`. (In ‚ĄĚ‚Č•0‚ąě the cobounded side-condition of `eventually_lt_of_limsup_lt` is discharged automatically by its `isBoundedDefault` autoparam.)

7. From `hrow M` get `‚ąÄŠ∂† n, dist (charFun ((őľ n).map (T M n)) t) c < őī/2`:
   `have hb := (Metric.tendsto_atTop.mp (hrow M) (őī/2) (by linarith))` ; obtain its `N‚āĀ`.
   From `hev` obtain `N‚āā` with `‚ąÄ n ‚Č• N‚āā, ENNReal.ofReal (‚ąę ‚Ä¶) < ENNReal.ofReal (2*őĶ)` (use `Filter.eventually_atTop.mp hev`).

8. Use `N := max N‚āĀ N‚āā`. For `n ‚Č• N`:
   - `dist (charFun ((őľ n).map (S n)) t) c ‚Č§ dist (charFun ((őľ n).map (S n)) t) (charFun ((őľ n).map (T M n)) t) + dist (charFun ((őľ n).map (T M n)) t) c` by `dist_triangle`.
   - First distance `= ‚ÄĖcharFun ((őľ n).map (S n)) t - charFun ((őľ n).map (T M n)) t‚ÄĖ` (`dist_eq_norm` / `Complex.dist_eq`) `‚Č§ |t| * Real.sqrt (‚ąę ŌČ, (S n ŌČ - T M n ŌČ)^2 ‚ąā(őľ n))` by `tendsto_charFun_sub_le_L2 (őľ n) (hS_sq n) (hT_sq M n) t`.
     Then from `hev`-at-`n`: `‚ąę ŌČ, (S n ŌČ - T M n ŌČ)^2 ‚ąā(őľ n) < 2*őĶ` (convert `ENNReal.ofReal x < ENNReal.ofReal (2*őĶ)` to `x < 2*őĶ` via `ENNReal.ofReal_lt_ofReal_iff_of_nonneg`/`ENNReal.ofReal_lt_ofReal_iff` using `2*őĶ > 0`; the integral of a square is `‚Č• 0` by `integral_nonneg`). So `Real.sqrt (‚ąę‚Ä¶) ‚Č§ Real.sqrt (2*őĶ)` (`Real.sqrt_le_sqrt`), giving first distance `‚Č§ |t|*‚ąö(2őĶ) < őī/2` (from step 4; need `|t| ‚Č• 0`).
   - Second distance `< őī/2` by `hN‚āĀ` (n ‚Č• N‚āĀ).

Watch the `(S n ŌČ - T M n ŌČ)` vs `(S n ŌČ - T m n ŌČ)` naming after you `set m := M`. Inspect every intermediate goal with lean_goal. Make sure the final `lake build` of `Diagonal` reports no errors and no new sorry.
